name: ai-ready
meaning: 唯一のトリガー。人間のみが付与する
description: Trigger: human assigns this to request AI processing

name: ai-processing
meaning: AI 処理中。二重起動防止ガード
description: AI is processing. Prevents duplicate runs

name: ai-investigated
meaning: 調査完了。Draft PR 作成済み・レビュー待ち
description: Investigation complete. Draft PR created for review

name: ai-failed
meaning: エラー・タイムアウト。人間の介入が必要
description: Error or timeout. Human intervention required
